name: atrea-amotion-card
description: Custom Lovelace card for Atrea aMotion ventilation units

scripts.preflight: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.release:patch: npm run preflight && npm version patch
scripts.release:minor: npm run preflight && npm version minor
scripts.release:major: npm run preflight && npm version major

author: alexelite
